observed_failure.surface: Storyline Design current SkillGuard contract compilation
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: the installation projection excludes source-only tests, fixtures, models, and notes
observed_failure.observed_result: the complete examples regression subtree was inventoried, but ordinary example files defaulted to runtime_source/copy because reviewed overrides could select only exact files; the same classifier also missed fixtures/ when the skill root was the repository root

generalized_repair.rule: A reviewed content-role override may select one maintained file or one maintained directory subtree; every inventoried descendant inherits the declared role and installation disposition, while overlapping selectors block without precedence or fallback.
generalized_repair.openspec_scenario: A reviewed source-only fixture subtree keeps future descendants out of installation and overlapping overrides block.
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: SkillGuard does not infer that every examples directory is a fixture; target owners must review and declare ambiguous subtrees explicitly.

required_revalidation: one portfolio-level final full validation after all governed sources freeze

revalidation_evidence.compiler_and_target_installation_tests: 57 cases: 56 passed and one explicit Windows directory-symlink permission skip

claim_boundary: The repair and focused evidence cover directory-scoped reviewed classification and installation projection only. They do not prove the final SkillGuard full parent, unrelated targets, publication, or future AI behavior.
